calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Justin Hedemark for Rick Lee and Phil Lee (Executors).
Carole Scagnetti for Shawna Lee (Co-Executor).

The Court expressed concern stating that all of the money was deposited into a single bank account and therefore was uninsured the entire time it's been sitting there, that it does not think the assets can be distributed directly to the Beneficiaries and that distribution needs to made to the trust. Ms. Scagnetti stated that she has no objection. The Court stated that there is no issue with the request for the reserve. Ms. Scagnetti stated that section 14 of the settlement agreement provides that if it is necessary for the estate to be delivered to the trust, then the Trustee will hold the $5,000.00 reserve, and that it took a long time to find a single bank that would accept three Co-Executors. The Court granted the First and Final Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. subject to receiving a revised order which will provide distribution to the trust.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
